title: Gravure Paradise!
author: Katsura Airi
description: Shinobu Sumida, a down-on-his-luck gravure otaku, unexpectedly starts living together with rookie gravure idol Sakura Katsuragi! But his heart-racing dream days are short-lived as lecherous photographers, crooked managers, and sexually harassing producers start closing in on his "beloved Sakura-chan" one after another!! Can Shinobu protect Sakura-chan's virtue!?

title: The Masterful Cat Is Depressed Again Today
author: Yamada Hitsuzi
description: Saku is an ordinary young woman who works long hours and lives alone with her cat, Yukichi. Yukichi, however, is not an ordinary house cat. For one, the temperamental feline towers over Saku and walks around on two legs. Instead of playing with toy mice, he scours supermarket flyers for good deals and keeps the house spotless. With a pet like that, it’s hard to tell who’s taking care of whom!

title: Zenbu Sukutte Yaru
author: Tsuneki Netarou
description: For example, 26 cats are killed every day. For example, 6 dogs are killed every day. There are people who struggle day and night to reduce the number of animals killed for various reasons - and there are "heroes" in every world!

title: Tomorrow, I Will Be Someone's Girlfriend
author: Wono Hinao
description: A bitter love story depicting the realities of love between female college students who earn money by renting themselves out to men as their girlfriends.

title: Re-Employment of the Former Strongest Hero
author: Takunori Akutsu
description: Dan was "the strongest and bravest" when he was young. But because of his lazy life, he is now a divorced, unemployed old man! He tries to earn money through quests for a living, but age has taken its toll on his strength and all that! He was approached by a silver-haired elf, a handsome man, and an S-rank adventurer... a young man of today’s generation!

title: Kimi ga Bokura wo Akuma to Yonda Koro
author: Sano Takashi (さの隆)
description: Yusuke Saito is a normal high school kid...well, normal enough, though there's six months missing out of his memory. But when he starts to get confronted by people who insist they're from his past, who allege that he did horrible things to them...suddenly Yusuke realizes that those missing six months may be crucial to remember. Otherwise, the skeletons in his closet may just make him a skeleton, too...

title: GATE: Where the JSDF Fought
author: Yanai Takumi
description: A gate appears in Tokyo's Ginza district sometime in the 21st century. From the gate pours out monsters, knights from middle-age Europe, and other fantasy-like beings, and they kill many of the citizens of Tokyo. This event is known as the Ginza Incident. The government sends a small group of soldiers from the Japanese Self-Defense Forces to the alternate world beyond the gate. Led by otaku soldier Youji, they find that the villages in the world are being attacked by a dragon. An elf girl who is a survivor from the dragon's rampage joins the group in their travels across the dangerous new world.

title: A Story About Getting Toyed With by a Femboy
author: Sakura Yuu
Cry Satori
description: A story about Mizuha, a femboy who toys with various ladies, and sometimes gets toyed with himself.

title: I Became the Overlord in Another World!
author: Ippitsu (One Stroke)
description:
He was just an ordinary, unremarkable office worker— until one day, he woke up to find himself in the body of the character he played in a game: the Overlord Fells!
Saying goodbye to his dull everyday life, he resolves to live on as Overlord Fells in the game world he loves so much.
With a host of beautiful girls and ultra-loyal retainers at his side, he sets out to make some serious Overlord moves... but things don’t go quite as planned!?

title: SUNNY 16
author: Watanuki Hiroya
description: Niina Hanabusa, 16. Admired by her friends as someone who's "won in life on looks alone", she quietly carries a complex about her deep indecisiveness, unable to make choices for herself. One day, a DSLR camera falls into her hands. With guidance from Mimiri, a former idol and alumna of her school, Niina begins to awaken to the quiet joy of pressing the shutter.

title: WITCHRIV
author: Hakuri
description: A girl named Nona lives in plain sight among humans, hiding her true identity as a mage as she spends her days in peace with her best friend Lovi. But one day, Nona uses magic to fix Lovi's glasses and subsequently catches the attention of the Bureau of Magic Surveillance. A simple good deed becomes the trigger that sets Nona's destiny in motion...

title: Vampire Knight
author: Hino Matsuri
description: Cross Academy is attended by two groups of students: the Day Class and the Night Class. At twilight, when the students of the Day Class return to their dorm, they cross paths with the Night Class on their way to school. Yuki Cross and Zero Kiryu are the Guardians of the school, protecting the Day Class from the Academy's dark secret: the Night Class is full of vampires!

title: Lily Love 2
author: Ratana Satis
description: Ploy has been avoiding her family and anything that's related to her family's business as long as she could. She is now, however, forced to be part of the business and dreads what her parents have in store for her. Hopefully, there is one thing that could help her bear all of it as a certain student applies for an internship at the hotel Ploy is at.

title: W x Y
author: Machiko Madoka
description: For the entirety of his life, Yokoda Takashi has been drawing erotic drawings and it has been his way of expressing his sexuality. And now, he has managed to become a successful erotic comedy manga author for a monthly magazine. His series stars a character named Aimi who is actually based loosely on his niece with the same name. He keeps his job a secret, especially from his family from the fear that using Aimi's name in such a perverted way would cause hatred from everyone. But his manga's popularity rises and gets moved to a weekly magazine where there are vastly more readers and it seems like only a matter of time until the truth comes out. Takashi has to struggle between protecting his secret while keeping up with the production and erotic creativeness that comes with a weekly magazine series.

title: Red Light Elegy
author: Kira Takashi
description: Satoshi Yanagawa is working part-time controlling traffic at work sites, and works with a beautiful girl that he likes at first sight. But she has a pretty bad character. Are there any prospects for romance? Read on to find out, the story is hilarious at certain moments, and touching at others.

title: Missileman Mammy
author: Kume Minoru
description:
Missileman Mammy, long sought after by Kazumine fans, has at last been reprinted.

By scanning from the original serialization in Shounen Magazine plus minor revisions by the author himself, the 1966's Missileman Mammy has waited 40 years to be reborn in the 21st century. We invite you to enjoy this classic manga by the hero manga legend, Daiji Kazumine!

title: The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten
author: Saeki-san
description: Mahiru is a beautiful girl whose classmates all call her an "angel." Not only is she a star athlete with perfect grades—she's also drop-dead gorgeous. Amane‚ an average guy and self-admitted slob‚ has never thought much of the divine beauty‚ despite attending the same school. Everything changes‚ however‚ when he happens to see Mahiru sitting alone in a park during a rainstorm.

title: Shijou Saikyou no Deshi Kenichi
author: Matsuena Shun (松江名俊)
description: Shirahama Kenichi is a book lover who has just entered high school, but he is often bullied by others. One day, he became good friends with the new transfer student, Fuurinji Miu, who was also looking for a friend. Kenichi was shocked at how powerful she is at first, but he is still somehow attracted to her…so he later goes to the dojo of her family and starts a training that will change his life.

title: Animal Human
author: Okada Takuya
description: A father and daughter find themselves lost in a nightmarish gathering—a grotesque banquet where figures draped in animal forms feast. But here, humans are livestock. Human flesh is the main course. The ones who operate this "human farm" are not quite beasts, yet neither are they human. They are something else entirely. The unlucky pair is about to experience the most horrifying "hospitality" imaginable. Meanwhile, Nero, a wildcat laborer at a farm, encounters the village's enigmatic leader, a deer-man named Ernest. Their meeting stirs something deep within Nero—a buried memory long forgotten...

title: Official "Test" Manga
author: Hologfx
description:
From the creator of popu***l***ar ser***i***es like ***T***wo Pi***e***ce, Da***r***uto, ***a***nd Detergent, comes the series Test, an award winning romantic comedy about a high schoo***l*** weapon meister named Yugi as he trave***l***s the entire world collecting all the Life Notes, so that one da***y*** ***h***e can recover h***i***s bro***t***her's body after performing the taboo of one punching the Titan we saw that day with his Stand and becoming the Nokage Pirate King -dattebayo. Watch as he roams through the Holy Empire of Britannia with his Onii-chan and generic harem girls as they conquer all odds with the power of friendship, love and…(why don't they just bang each other.) In this feature length epic rivaling that of Gilgamesh and the Iliad we will explore the mentality and sociology of these societal menaces as they ravage the Earth in their never quenchable thirst for imoutos.  Reviewers gives this series a 10/10 for the unconventional portrayal of the magical girl genre.  Nominated for the 1st Mangadex Award for Worst Manga of the Year.  Winner of the 2nd Mangadex Awards for Best Manga of the Year.  Best manga ever written, as stated by meichiro noda.

---

**Note:** Please do *NOT* add genres or Test will pollute genre searches. Because this manga is the most purest form of any manga [The plural of manga is manga]
**Fun fact:** In the year 127, when this manga was originally released, it used to be called Taest, but because of American per/letter printing costs it was shortened to Test.

+++ hah

Only a centimeter away… I mean, I don't think there's ever been someone who's gotten that close to me… without a, you know… calamity occurring. I'm not really… not really sure what happens at one centimeter away… 'cause it's my first time. I don't really understand it either. Seriously. But in the flow of calamity… there's nobody who can attack me. Not a single person. That, I know for sure. Wonder of U.” - Unknown

title: POWPOW! Odyssey
author: Mud
description:
A parody of modern shounen

A young rabbit man and his two dipshit friends try to solve the murder of one of their fathers.

[Soundtrack to listen to while reading]https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL352CWaMNzHOtH6SLjzZqDitIGcKrGMoE

title: Zero no Chukaima - Yo–chien Nano!
author: Takamura Masaya
description: A 4-koma featuring super-deformed versions of the cast of Zero no Tsukaima.

title: The House in Fata Morgana - The Veil Over Your Eyes
author: Keika Hanada
description:
From Sekai Project:  
  
You awaken in a decrepit old mansion.  
  
A woman with eyes of jade stands before You, informing You that You are the Master of the house, and she Your Maid. However, You have no memories, no concept of self—or, indeed, any certainty that You are even alive.  
  
The Maid invites You to join her on a journey through the mansion's lifeless halls, to behold the numerous tragedies that have befallen its residents. She suggests that among them, perhaps You will find some trace of Yourself.  
  
Beyond the first door lies the year 1603.  
It is an era of unparalleled beauty, where art and theatre flourish. Roses bloom abundantly in the garden where the inseparable Rhodes siblings play, and though they appear to be free of worry and strife… not everyone is content to see them happy.  
  
Beyond the second door lies the year 1707.  
In this era, the mansion lies in ruins, and a beast dwells within. He claims to yearn for a life of serenity, but it is not long before he yields to his innate savagery and a massacre ensues.  
  
Beyond the third door lies the year 1869.  
In this technologically advanced era, people are always on the move. The mansion's master is an ambitious businessman who has invested in the rail industry. However, his obsession with wealth and power leads him to neglect and mistreat his wife.  
  
Beyond the fourth door lies the year 1099.  
The Maid tells You that this is the final tale. In this era, You see a young man who claims to be cursed and a girl with white hair, called Giselle, who has been branded a witch and marked for death.  
  
Having borne witness to these four tragedies, each set in a different time and place, You are now free to choose whether You wish to end Your story here… or press on.  
  
But there are those who would say, "You were able to bear them because they weren't your tragedies."

title: Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun: IruMafia Edition
author: Hiroja
description: The beloved characters of Mairimashita! Iruma-kun star in this Mafia-based spinoff! Young Iruma saves an injured mob boss from death... and then becomes his grandson!?

title: THE BAND
author: Harold Sakuishi
description: As an elementary schooler, Araki Yuuhei saw a live music show and was deeply inspired. Now in middle school, he reunites with his music-loving friend Matarou and gets a strange crescent-shaped guitar. From there, Yuuhei becomes obsessed with guitar and ends up performing at his first live show with Matarou!

title: Let's Make a Deal: A Hard-Working Girl Living With a Caring Demon
author: Hashimoto Rideon
description:
A demon named Adele appears before Hitsuji, a single office worker who leads a busy life! After making a contract with the demon, Hitsuji and Adele begin living together. While their life as a demon and a human may seem odd, it turns out to be surprisingly comfortable...!?

A heartwarming, laid-back comedy for all hard-working women.

title: Is She Making Fun of Me?
author: Nawar dagher
description: The life of a socially anxious girl who just wants to make friends — and the mysterious classmate who keeps her guessing: is she being kind, or making fun of her?

title: As a Reincarnated Aristocrat, I'll Use My Appraisal Skill to Rise in the World: I Inherited a Weak Territory, and If I Increase the Number of Capable Personnel, It Will Become the Strongest Territory
author: Miraijin A
description: After being reincarnated, Ars Louvent is supposed to live in a different world as a weak aristocrat. Both his physical strength and intelligence were mediocre in both worlds, but here he naturally possessed a skill called "Appraisal" that allowed him to see the potential of any person. By gathering talented people by his side, Ars uses this "Appraisal" skill to transform his weak territory into the strongest one! But the road ahead of him won't be so simple.

title: Me and the Prez, Drinking Under the Stars
author: Zurikishi
description: After the sudden death of her father, 24-year-old Reina Izutsu finds herself at the helm of the family business, Izutsu Printing. Thrust into the role of company president, the pressure quickly hardens her demeanor—leaving her employees walking on eggshells, especially Kenichi Ishizumi, the stoic 37-year-old senior supervisor. One night, overwhelmed and tipsy in a quiet park, Reina blurts out, "That's it! I quit being everyone's boss!"—completely unaware that the man beside her is her employee. Under the soft glow of the stars, he listens silently... and makes a quiet vow to stand by her side.

title: The Outlandish Ukiyo-e of Edo
author: Kago Shintaro
description: Shintaro Kago's new series, which began serialization with the April 2026 issue of Jizuwa BUNKA Taboo, aims to profile a different ukiyo-e artist each month.

title: Delinquent High School Girl Kuzuhana-chan
author: Sogabe Toshinori
description: At the beginning of the academic year, Saotome Hodaka enrolls into Moteshiro Prefectural High School, a former all-girls school that had recently integrated, but discovers it has a male to female ratio of 1:359! While most might think of this as a paradise, the majority of the students are delinquents and Saotome immediately finds himself being extorted by some of the more aggressive girls. However, he is inadvertently saved by Hanako Kuzuryu, a beautiful delinquent who just wants to be left alone. Is this the start of a new friendship? And how will Saotome's life unfold in a school full of troublesome women?

title: Walking The Rising Adventurer's Path With A Dragon ~The Recovery Magician Who Was Expelled From His S-Rank Party As No Longer Useful Ends Up Reviving The Strongest Divine Dragon In The Place Where He Was Abandoned~
author: Kishimoto Kazuha
description:
**“Understand for yourself that you are worthless. You are already obsolete.”**

Dion, the recovery wizard who was told so, was seriously injured by the hands of party members and left behind in the interior of the highest difficulty dungeon. On the verge of running out of his life, he happens to encounter a dying dragon. Dion realized that he couldn't help him anymore, and he treated the dragon to live as a recovery wizard until the end. Then the dragon thanked him and even shared the power of the dragon. In addition, this dragon seems to have been a legendary god dragon-class. Dion escapes from the dungeon with his new companion, the dragon, and restarts as an adventurer. He captures the difficult dungeons that stand in his way, and his abilities are recognized and he has all the strong men on his side.
___
**Character Designer:** [Sisoe](https://mangadex.org/author/9a1a04cb-1d27-4601-809d-665b4f4918c4)

**Additional Links:**  
- Alt Official Raw: [niconico Manga](https://manga.nicovideo.jp/comic/55539)
- [Official Raw Web Novel](https://ncode.syosetu.com/n6844gh)
- [Official Raw Light Novel](https://www.bunkasha.co.jp/author/a236341.html)

title: Made in Abyss
author: Tsukushi Akihito
description:
The enormous cave system, known as the Abyss, is the last unexplored place in the world. Nobody knows how deep down goes this titanic pit, inhabited by strange and wondrous creatures and full of mysterious ancient relics which purpose in unknown to modern man. Generations of bold adventurers have been drawn by the cryptic depths of the Abyss. In course of time those brave enough to explore the dangerous pit came to be known as "Delvers."

In Orth, the town at the edge of the Abyss, there lives a little orphan named Riko, who dreams of becoming as great a delver as her mother was and solving the great mystery of the pit. One day, exploring the murky depths, she stumbles upon a little boy who turns out to be a robot...

title: A Very Popular Idol Classmate has Taken a Liking to Me, a Person Who doesn't Want to Work for my Whole Life
author: Kishimoto Kazuha
description: Rintaro Shido, a high school student who aspires to become a full-time househusband, is in the class with a very popular idol, Rei Otosaki. The two have no connection other than being classmates, but their relationship changes drastically when Rintaro serves Rei a home-cooked meal after she nearly collapses from hunger! The food was so delicious that Rei said, "Can I come here every day to eat?"...!?

title: You’re the Only One I Can See
author: ChaeGun
description: Following the advice of his imaginary friend Jason, who told him, "Treat all girls like stones," Park Jin-yong starts seeing every girl as a stone. But then Sunwoo, a female student who doesn’t look like a stone, appears before him, and for the first time in five years, the sight of a girl’s face sends Jin-yong’s happy little circuits into overdrive...

title: You're So Sloppy, Hotta-sensei
author: Nakada Mao
description: Makoto Kuribayashi is your typical high schooler with a not-so-typical after-school gig as a housekeeper. His latest client? None other than his school’s most popular teacher, the gorgeous Rumiko Hotta. But Hotta-sensei is hiding a dirty little secret: she's a total slob, the polar opposite of her flawless public image! Now, Makoto's got the unenviable task of cleaning up after her mess.

title: There Are No Ordinary Books!
author: Asakura Giichi
description:
Satou Aki, aspiring novelist. I decided to work a part-time job at a bookstore to polish myself! However, Azumi Books where I started working… It's an adult bookstore that only stocks obscene items…!?

The unique staff members toy with and trample on Satou's pure feelings♡. A stimulating romantic comedy!!

title: Shoujouhime
author: ippatu
description:
A girl who was sealed away is released by a handsome passing monk!

The story that has inspired countless masterpiece manga now receives a new lease on life. The New Interpretation of Journey to the West begins! This is a battle action and "love"? comedy presented by ippatu, the artist behind [Toratsugumi (Tiger Thrush)](https://mangadex.org/title/b3203295-5353-4a61-8df2-9a9eabf5230c/tsugumi-project), a work that boasts massive popularity in France and the rest of Europe!

title: Chainsmoker Cat
author: Nyan Nyan Factory
description:
Welcome to Yani's apartment. Please don't mind the smell. Yani is a catgirl with a seriously bad smoking habit. Every time she tries to quit, she becomes weak to the cravings and gives in almost instantly. Behind on her rent and unable to hold down a job, her friends and sister rally around to help her out. But when she's using her pee to put out cigarette fires, they may just have their work cut out for them. Will she ever get her life together, or is she doomed to live as a chainsmoking slob forever?
___
**Additional Links:**
- [Official X](https://x.com/yani_neko1111)

title: Akanabe-sensei Doesn't Know About Embarrassment
author: Naoya Tajimi
description: Kouki Sakieda is an assistant for Akira Akanabe, a manga artist he admires, who always tries to praise him in some way. Sakieda is worried that he will end up falling in love with her if this situation continues. Then Akanabe unexpectedly asks him to go out with her...

title: Dig It
author: Yoshida Maru
description:
As the son of retired Japanese national team ace Shishiya Kei, Shishiya Gaku was the ace of his middle school club team, but he wondered if he was suited to be an attacker.
One day, Kei came to watch Gaku practice and met Noboru, who had exceptional talent as an attacker, and declared that he would make him the best volleyball player in Japan. The father-son relationship ended. Gaku vowed to prove his own limits as an attacker and beat his father and Noboru with the volleyball style he had pioneered.

title: Sweet Life
author: Yuzuki Hikaru
description:
The complicated story of a young man who goes to work for a lingerie company. 
One of the very first harem manga, done by a former shojo mangaka known for his peculiar tendencies 
(was known to cross dress among other things) and serialized in the now defunct Business Jump.
 
+++Volume titles and Romaji equivalent:

+++

title: Golden Ratio I Don't Want To Be Far From Love
author: ก่อนกรกฎ
description: "Freen Pruttharin," a 28-year-old freelance photographer, falls in love with "Nicha Sisirnich," a 40-year-old associate professor known as the "Ice Witch." However, Associate Professor Nicha has made it clear that she isn't interested in starting a new relationship and has never been swayed by any woman. Yet, fate gradually brings the two closer, sparking a feeling of wanting to experience love again and open their hearts once more.

title: Hacking Ghost: A School Where Only Your Body has Value
author: Masai
description: In an era where one in every twenty people awakens to a "special ability," Hiroto Takigami is a weak ability user who can only communicate with spirits. However, for some reason, his stepsister Rei, the most powerful ability user, harbors deep hatred toward him. The moment he graduates from an ability training institution and gains full control over his power, Rei will kill him. With only one year left to live—his "remaining lifespan" set—Hiroto falls into despair. Just then, a certain spirit appears before him, revealing an unexpected secret about his ability...

title: My Senpai is Annoying
author: Shiro Manta
description:
Futaba Igarashi is a diminutive office lady who finds that her towering and boisterous work senpai Harumi Takeda always gets in her hair, but he always has her back, he always keeps her company, and she starts noticing that her heart is slowly veering towards him…

Won 1st place in the 2018 Next Manga Awards Web Category.
___

title: Shin Dragon Ball After
author: Young Jijii
Omada Naoyuki
description: In Age 788, the Dragon World is at peace, when a tremendous threat appears… the strongest Saiyan warrior, Kakarrot, has awakened! Son Goku, the hero who brought peace to Earth, attacks his own family and friends! His fated rival, Vegeta, tries to stop him in a battle of destiny! Will Vegeta be able to defeat Kakarrot…? And what will become of the Dragon World…?

title: KidGunAGE
author: DDfate
Warudos
description:
What does it mean too "Age" for Malt the reincarnation of a legendary warrior. He'll come to the realization that he isn't Jesus. Just a young boy caught in a deadly battle. 

"Kidbattles" have become the ultimate test of power and prestige. These are no ordinary duels—the Reincarnated do not carry steel; they wield their closest companions. Friends are transformed into monsters, their strength determined by the Kidgun themselves.

title: Those Who Get Caught Up in Another World are Usually Cheaters
author: Kaitou Hakobune
description: One day during lunch break, High School student Takanashi Kyousai and four friends are suddenly transported to another world of Swords and Magic. The Princess of the Other World, who was the Time- Space Magician that summoned them, wants them to be Heroes and defeat the Demon King to save her world. While his four friends were taken aback by this sudden turn of events, Kyousai was calm and said, "It's just like a story." However the Princess made a shocking statement: "I only summoned four Heroes, didn't I?"

title: The Result of the Villainess Striving to Act Like the Heroine to Avoid Her Destruction: Although She Longs for a Lazy Retirement, She’s Confused by Entering the Second Prince’s Obsessive Love Route
author: Ichibu Saki
description: A former corporate slave from a black company has reincarnated as Serafina, the villainess of an otome game!  Being a villainess is way too much work for her. Having already slaved away enough for a lifetime in her past world, she’s determined to spend this new existence in absolute, blissful laziness...!  With that goal in mind, her plan was simple: avoid her own destruction just to secure a life of unlimited naps. However, for some reason, the affection levels of the characters around her just won't stop rising...

title: My Isekai Life: I Gained a Second Character Class and Became the Strongest Sage in the World!
author: Shinkou Shotou
description: Sano Yuji, a black company employee, is summoned to another world while finishing his work at home. His profession in the other world, a Monster Tamer, is considered a job that makes it difficult to become an adventurer. However, thanks to some slimes he met, which read several magical books, he gained magical powers and the second profession, Sage. Yuji acquired overwhelming power, but is he conscious of his strength? Blindly becoming unparalleled and strongest in the world!

title: Friend Girlfriend
author: Rukako
description: Yuki and Asaka are childhood friends and best friends. One day, after a boy confesses to her, Asaka tells her friend, "I'm going to try dating him. Just for the experience." Yuki, totally pissed at the thought of her best friend being taken away by some rando who appeared out of nowhere, finds herself...

title: Haunted Peak
author: Minenami Ryo
description: High schooler Miko, who thought he'd be inheriting his grandfather's mountain, has lost his crush to his friend and is at the bottom of his school's hierarchy. His one solace was the mountain, but now a mysterious masked man is building a small cabin there... Tagline: Am I weak? A tale of love and hate spiraling around a mountain.

title: Tottemo Yasashii Amae-chan!
author: Chilt
description:
Amae-chan is so sweet, kind, tender… she makes me feel so happy.  
  
And then there's me, the disappointment of a manga artist. But I will not be discouraged as long as I have Amae-chan with me!

title: Kandou saretanode Tanteiya Hajimemasu! Jitsuwa Boukoku no Oujoda nante Naishodesu
author: Nagase Sarasa
description: When it comes to light that Octavia de Reine isn't a legitimate member of the noble House of Reine, she swiftly finds herself disowned. At first she takes this in stride... until her power hungry father and ex-suitor start vying for the house full of mysterious heirlooms that her doting grandmother left her. Little does her family know that she's destined to inherit an even greater legacy. Olivia hopes to follow in Granny's footsteps and become a famous detective, after all! She'll face off against young noblemen, phantom thieves, and magical items corrupted by demonic forces. Oh, and one vengeful angel queen. Moreover, who's this suspiciously young marquis that seems so smitten with her...?

title: Eating Me Is Not Allowed!
author: Jo9 (조9)
description: Nam Haesul, who is handsome but famous for his dog-like personality, is only nice to his childhood friend, Yang Miru. "It's clear that he's nice to me because he likes me!" But is it really like that? Miru has no idea about Haesul’s true feelings. Then one day, she finds out about the 'black heart' that Haesul harbors! Cracks are starting to appear in their 10-year friendship...! The wild growth story of a wolf boy and an innocent girl!

title: The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, Really Love You
author: Nakamura Rikito
description: Aijo Rentaro has asked a hundred girls out and struck out every time. In desperation, he prays for guidance, only to be told by a god that his rejections were due to a cosmic mishap! Now this god will set things right by making sure Aijo gets one hundred dates. Except, as things often go with gods, there’s a catch: each of his one hundred dates is Aijo’s destined soulmate! Worse, if he doesn’t return their feelings, they’ll all die in horrible - and hilarious - accidents!

title: Don't Touch, Kotesashi-kun
author: Shinjou Takuya
description: Kotesashi Kouyou is an outstanding masseur, and aspiring sports doctor. Aiming to obtain a scholarship for medical school, he begins attending Seiwa High School, a sports powerhouse, this spring. As his family is poor he has to work as the hostels' manager, where he is also allowed to stay, to pay for his school expenses. Here he meets high school girl athletes, each with their own individual quirks. As the hostels' new manager, Kotesashi must now take care of their physical and mental needs!

title: Lucky☆Star: Konata's Thirties
author: Hongo Haruki
description: The official Spinoff manga, following Konata and her friends in their 30s.

title: Kinki Chihou no Aru Basho ni Tsuite
author: Sesuji
description: My friend Ozawa, who has gone missing. He was an editor of an occult magazine, and before his disappearance, he had covered ghost stories related to an area called "●●●●●". Quotes from past magazine articles, strange stories from readers, and Internet bulletin board posts - as we follow his footsteps and decipher the materials he had collected, certain connections emerge between the ghost stories that had been treated as separate incidents.

title: Saint Seiya: Rerise of Poseidon
author: Suda Tsunakan
Kurumada Masami
description:
The sanctuary is exhausted after the battle against the Lord of Darkness Hades.
In the absence of Seiya and the others, the land was about to meet its end in the wrath of the goddess Nemesis!
At that moment, the Emperor of the Sea Poseidon awakens to Hades' call and, together with the Seven Marina Generals challenges Nemesis and their Heroic Souls who serve her in battle!

title: Please, step on me my prince
author: 건짱
description:
**"I want to be proposed to by a rich man! I'm confident I can work hard as a homemaker!"**

Hansol, a kindergarten teacher and aspiring perfect homemaker, is living a busy life, searching for a husband who will make him a Cinderella.

His biggest interest these days is Yushin, a single dad and a parent (of one of his students). A kind smile, a handsome face, a killer ass, sexy forearms, and even sexier, a ridiculously expensive imported car.

And that very Yushin suddenly asks Hansol on a date?! Can Hansol truly achieve the dream he has held for so long?

We thought he was an aspiring perfect homemaker, but it turns out he’s an aspiring Slave Seme, And a "reverse" Dominant Uke who is so perfect that even his demanding attitude is perfect.

A "Training the Slave Seme" rom-com!

title: THE iDOLM@STER Cinderella Girls - After20
author: Bandai Namco Entertainment
description:
A slice-of-life series about idols after 20 enjoying good food and drink.   
  
Part of [THE iDOLM@STER](https://mangadex.org/?page=search&title=iDOLM%40STER) series.

title: THE iDOLM@STER Cinderella Girls - U149
author: Bandai Namco Entertainment
description: U149, also known as "Under149", is a spinoff story of Cinderella Girls encompassing the younger idols, who are under 149 cm, and their pursuits to be big time idols with their newly hired P-san.

title: Kono Healer, Mendokusai
author: Tannen ni Hakkou
description: Fantasy adventuring comedy starring Karla the dark elf cleric who invested too much on her taunting skills and Alvin the swordsman who has to put up with her.

title: Fallen Contract
author: Bao Qing Manhua (暴青漫画)
description:
Jiang Yan was forced into an arranged marriage by her stepmother, which quickly became a trending topic online. To get out of the mess, she agreed to a contract marriage with Gu Linxiu, someone she had just met.

What Jiang Yan thought about Gu Linxiu: wealthy, wheelchair-bound, and still mourning a lost love from his past.

Reality: he is rich — extremely so. His disability? Just a misunderstanding. And his "lost love"? She’s not dead at all. In fact, it’s her.

When Jiang Yan saw the wall full of photos of her and Gu Linxiu from their younger years — along with secretly taken pictures of her daily life — she was completely stunned.

Wait… was she in the dark about their relationship this whole time and no one told her?

title: Dara-san of Reiwa
author: Tomotsuka Haruomi
description:
On a stormy day, a landslide destroys a fence, and siblings who ventured into a long-prohibited area encounter a terrifyingly bizarre creature…

“I'm a curse god, you know!? Don't you think anything of this grotesque form?!?”

The unflappable siblings, rather than being scared, casually call the creature “Dara-san” and grow fond of her!?
___
**Additional Links:**
- Alt Official Raw: [niconico Manga](https://manga.nicovideo.jp/comic/57766)
- [Official X](https://twitter.com/darasan_PR)

title: The Hachioji Specialty: Tengu's Love
author: Tsukizuki Yoshi
description:
The life of a single-minded tengu bride and a lonely young man living together on the premise of marriage!

Kotaro, a lonely young man who has returned to his hometown for some reason, is reunited with Hime, a tengu girl, at Mt. Hime says that they must get married! A one-sided (?) marriage is assumed. Living together with a tengu is full of surprises!
___
**Note:** The series is authored by Nanao Tomo, which is an alias of Tsukizuki Yoshi.

title: Jobless Gye Baek-sun
author: Zirarval
description: With no savings, average qualifications, and a bank balance consistently below 10,000 won, can the Backbone Breaker Gye Baeksun really escape unemployment?

title: Hana and the Beast Man
author: Yuzuki Chihiro
description:
"How'd you get in here, human?"

A large wall has always stood between humans and the beast people. Hana accidently finds a hole in the wall and sneaks in, only to get lost. She meets Sana, who pins her down using his large frame. Hana trembles as Sana interrogates her with sharp eyes, demanding to know her purpose inside the wall. She can't escape! But, even though she's been captured as an "intruder," Sana ends up sheltering Hana in his home from the other beast people... What's going on?

A sweet, heartwarming love story, though a little on the wild side! Read on to learn the joys of inter-species romance!

title: Hinako's Notes
author: Mitsuki (三月)
description: Hinako has trouble communicating with others. The moment she tries to speak, she freezes up and can't get the words out. In an effort to get better at communication, she moves from the countryside to Tokyo to attend a high school with a famous theatre club, only to find out the club has been disbanded! Together with new friends she meets at her boarding house, including a kind senior who was once a child actress, a shy girl obsessed with maid clothes, and a literary girl with a literal taste for books, Hinako's journey to take the stage and find her voice begins.

title: The Dangers in My Heart
author: Sakurai Norio
description:
Following Ichikawa Kyoutarou, a teenage boy belonging to the very bottom caste of his school, this work details his troubled interactions with a certain classmate, and his attempt to hide murderous impulses that find themselves in the darkest recesses of his soul. In reality, though, it's a sweet youth rom-com between a messed up boy and a bright, if somewhat strange, beautiful girl.
___
**Awards:**
- Won the 2020 Next Manga Award in the Web category.
- Was nominated for the 2020 and 2021 Manga Taishou Award.
- Won the top prize of the 2021 Tsutaya Comic Awards.

**Additional Links:**
- [Official X](https://x.com/boku__yaba)

title: The Rising of the Shield Hero Anthology - Together with Raphtalia
author: Tanimura Marika
Aneko Yusagi
Ishimari Yuuya
Araragi Ayune
Mito
Nojii
Itohana
Neet
Satou Yuuko
Aiya Kyu
Sanshoku Amido
Akano Amamichi
Mori Airi
Akagashi
Karakuchi Muusu
Yoshino Sora
Futaba Masumi
description:
A collection of stories by various mangaka, centered around the hit series The Rising of the Shield Hero.
  
---
**Volume 1 - Raphtalia to Issho**
**Cover**: [Aiya Kyu](https://mangadex.org/author/7f432ca1-ae38-4280-8bbb-c1a9cff65528)

**Author list**:
1. Aiya Kyu
2. Mito
3. Itohana
4. Ishimari Yuuya
5. Karakuchi Muusu
6. Nojii
7. Mori Airi
8. Akagashi
9. Satou Yuuko
10. Tanimura Marika

Includes Side Story by Aneko Yusagi ([Translation](https://tanookime.wordpress.com/2020/06/07/the-rising-of-the-shield-hero-anthology-together-with-raphtalia/)).

---
**Volume 2 - Filo to Issho**
**Cover**: [Aiya Kyu](https://mangadex.org/author/7f432ca1-ae38-4280-8bbb-c1a9cff65528)

**Author list**:
1. Aiya Kyu
2. Neet
3. Mito
4. Karakuchi Muusu
5. Akano Amamichi
6. Itohana
7. Yoshino Sora
8. Araragi Ayune
9. Futaba Masumi
10. Sanshoku Amido.
11. Nojii

Includes Side Story by Aneko Yusagi.

title: This Kind of Thing is Fine
author: Souryuu
description:
Do what we want, when we want, with the person we want. Such a relationship needs no label.

Murata and Tomoka, who are tired of their past relationships, become friends after sharing a game online and decide to go directly to a love hotel. After this evening, they meet regularly and have a good time together.

title: I Want To Make The Losing Heroine Win!!
author: Nakayama Michiru
description:
Manaka Kawashima, a high school girl, is in love with her childhood friend and classmate, Ei Eguchi. She continues to think of him with single-minded devotion… until another heroine, Ayame Takabi, suddenly transfers into their class.

Unlike Kawashima, however, Takabi is a natural-born winning heroine: on the very morning of her transfer, she bumps into Ei-kun on the way to school, gets a lucky perv moment, and basically hits every classic rom-com flag right out of the gate.

Kawashima falls into despair... but then the story’s background character MC, Kimura, decides he’s going to fight to guide her from being a losing heroine to a winning heroine…!?

title: Oshi ni Amagami
author: Suzuki Julietta
description:
Hina is a reclusive otaku vampire. She wants to move to a sacred place for otaku life, but a boy who looks exactly like her favorite vampire lives next door! And this boy seems to have blood that attracts vampires from all over the world...?
___
Note: Adapted from the author’s oneshot that was released in Hana to Yume 10-11/2022 combined issue.

title: The Frontier Bathhouse Turns Into a Harem: The Old Mountain Hot Spring with Cheat-Level Powers That Female Adventurers Can't Get Enough Of
author: Yoshimura Tatsumaki
description: Deep in the mountains, a young man named Rio manages an old, run-down hot spring. Using his mysterious skill, he adjusts the properties of the waters only to discover that what he thought was ordinary is actually cheat-level powerful! News spreads fast, and soon female adventurers of all kinds flock to the spring. But there's a catch... the waters don't just heal; they also awaken certain desires...

title: Ten Years After the Slaves I Picked Up Left on a Journey, I Somehow Became a Legend
author: AteRa
toi8

title: Reincarnated as a Dragon Hatchling
author: Necoco
description:
**A fantasy isekai adventure about a man who has to restart life…as an egg?!**

In a world full of dangerous monsters, our unnamed protagonist finds himself reborn at the very bottom of the food chain as an immobile, powerless egg. Even just hatching will require leveling up by fighting monsters–the same monsters who’d love to eat him as a snack. But with the help of the mysterious voice in his head, he’s determined to grow into the most powerful creature in the world!

*Source: Seven Seas Entertainment*

**Note:** When the manga initially began, it used the light novel's “Saikyou Igai Mezasa nee” subtitle, but by the time of Volume 1, it used its own “Ibara no Dragon Road” subtitle.
___
**Character Designer:** [NAJI Yanagida](https://mangadex.org/author/741e1007-4b08-4ce7-981c-b72ba391936e)

title: Arknights: 123 Rhodes Island!?
author: Hypergryph
description: Get to know the operators with Amiya and the Doctor!

title: Battle Studies
author: Nakibokuro
description:
You can’t win through only with “friendship” and “youth”. We stake our lives to get to Koshien!!  
  
Kanou Shoutarou entered an official baseball club at one of the best powerhouse baseball schools in the country - DL Gakuen. However the discipline in the club, he admired so much, was beyond all imagination!  
  
From Nakibokuro - the former member of PL Gakuen’s baseball club who played at the Koshien as the regular!

title: Listening to the stars
author: Lily Club (橘姬社)
Ice Free Herbal Jelly (去冰仙草冻)
description: Having suffered several setbacks in her attempt to be a voice actor, Chi Yu no longer dares to bring up her hobby of dubbing in front of others. Instead, she covertly tunes in to voice drama broadcasts on Lily Radio. One day, during a public lecture at her university, she discovers that Yu Chen from the neighboring college shares a strikingly similar voice to the host of Lily Radio.

title: Mane Mane Nichi Nichi
author: Yamamoto Souichirou
description: In a certain school lies a certain club and its three managers. Though unremarkable, days that can't be found anywhere else have begun!

title: Nine Peaks
author: Tetsuhiro Hirakawa
description:
After just starting at his new school, Mashio Gaku is suspended within a week for getting into a scuffle with a third year. After returning home to his disapproving dad's okonomiyaki joint, his father, Mashio Harumi, can't help but reprimand him and refuses to serve him. Their harsh words are the last exchange they share before an unfortunate traffic accident takes Harumi's life.

At his father's wake, Gaku finds out he was, in his words, a big fuckin' deal. In mourning, Gaku heads out to fish like him and his father always would, only to hook a big catch and get pulled into the water... When he comes to, he finds himself staring a familiar stranger in the face... **in the year 2000.**

title: Karaoke Iko!
author: Wayama Yama
description:
"Can you give me some tips to sing well?"

The head of the chorus club, Satomi, gets entangled with a yakuza called Kyouji and was asked for singing lessons. Kyouji really wants to get better at singing so he kidnaps Satomi every week despite his unwillingness to teach him to sing.

But before long, a strange friendship begins to grow between the two of them…?

title: Chillin' in Another World with Level 2 Super Cheat Powers
author: Kinojo Miya
description: Banaza, who was summoned to the magic kingdom of Klyrode as a Hero candidate, was disqualified as a Hero because of his ordinary abilities. He was supposed to be returned to his original world, but due to the magical kingdom's mistake, he became unable to return to his original world. However, the moment he reached Level 2, he acquired every single possible skill and kind of magic, turning him into a super cheat with infinite skills! Despite this, he takes Fenrys of the demons as his wife, and fully enjoys his newly-married life with an easygoing smile. He changes his name to Flio and tries to lead his life quietly, but things are a bit chaotic with the likes of a pet saber, four freeloading female knights, a Majin, and even an ex-Demon Lord. However, even with all of this chaos, he still manages to enjoy his life peacefully.

title: Tales of Demons and Gods
author: Mad Snail
description:
Nie Li became the strongest Demon Spiritualist and stood at the pinnacle of the martial world. However, he lost his life during the battle with the Sage-Emperor and six deity-ranked beasts.  
  
His soul was then brought back to when he was still 13 years old. At this point in his life, Nie Li was considered to be the most pathetic of his peers. However, with the vast knowledge he accumulated from his previous life (his future), he began becoming stronger faster than anyone could expect. He also decided to help those who died nobly in his previous life become stronger as well.  
  
Aiming to avert the future destruction of his home by demon beasts, and to avoid his previous fate of ending up destroyed, Nie Li fights to protect his lover, friends, family and fellow citizens who died in the beast assault or its aftermath. He also aims to destroy the so-called "sacred family," who will abandon their duty and betray the city.

title: Idol x Idol Story!
author: Tokunou Shoutarou
description:
Mimi Nagisa (22 years old) is a former idol. After giving up on her dream of being an idol because of her lacking talent she spends her days working part-time while attending college. However, the moment she meets the idol Ibuki Nanakusa, whom she recently found interest in, their lives begin to cross each other.

(Source: Comic Fuz, translated)
___
* [Official Twitter](https://twitter.com/idol2story_info)

title: +Tic Elder Sister
author: Kurii Cha
description: The story follows a third-year high-school girl (Nee-san) who likes building plastic models in a model-making club along with fellow club members Makimaki and Okappa.

title: Angolmois - Record of the Mongol Invasion of Japan
author: Takagi Nanahiko
description:
In the 13th century, the Mongolian Empire rapidly expands across the globe. Later historians who studied the prophecies of Nostradamus would say that Mongolia was the birthplace of the "Great King of Terror," Angolmois. And at last, the force of the Mongolian Empire would turn their attention toward Japan… 1274: The Bun'ei Invasion. The exiled samurai Jinzaburou Kuchii is in Kamakura when he finds himself face to face with this invasion.  
  
This story is a fresh look at the great battle that rocked all of medieval Japan: the Mongol Invasion. It shows how the people of Tsushima panicked, struggled, and eventually rose up against the overwhelming forces of their enemy.  


---

**Links:**  
- [Anime on ANN](https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/anime.php?id=20771)  
  
 [Official Korean](https://www.aladin.co.kr/shop/wproduct.aspx?ItemId=189251342)

title: I Have No Home
author: Wanan
description:
Haejoon Goh, who ran from home, and Eunyung Baek, the problem child who lives in a tent.   
These two, who met under terrible circumstances, are forced to live together in an abandoned dormitory.   
This is a story of difficult growth between two people who hate both the dorm and each other.

title: Galactic Civil War Chronicle Thunder Jet
author: Manabe Jouji
description:
With the decline of the Galactic Empire, the Milky Way has dissolved into a confusion of warring leaders. One of the strongest of these warlords manages to defeat the imperial Asou Shuzen, and take the remaining imperial family member, the Princess Shimon, as a prisoner. Will she be able to become something more than a pawn in her captor's ambitious plans of conquest? In the meantime Ryuga Rai, a solider of Shusen Army, has become fed up with his leader after returning from a battle with only 3 surviving soldiers in his band. But all Rai's defiance gains him is a glimpse of Princess Shimon and an unwanted place in the warlord's wild daughter's bed. What will future hold for Rai and for the galaxy?  


---

**Links:**  
- [Author's Twitter](https://twitter.com/glc09bk88pgot7u)  
- [Anime on ANN](https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/anime.php?id=2225)

title: Living Together with the Queen from My High School Days Who was Arrogant, Surprisingly isn't That Uncomfortable
author: Dozaemon Misoneta
description:
"Hey, wanna do it?"

One late night, Yamamoto, a college student working part-time at a convenience store, reunites with Hayashi Megumi, his high school classmate and the most beautiful girl in their class. Known as the "Queen" for her strong-willed and arrogant personality, Yamamoto had always found her difficult to get along with. However, during a routine conversation, he notices painful bruises on her wrist. After learning that her boyfriend had been abusing her, Yamamoto decides to let Hayashi stay at his place...!?

title: Kanamori-san, The Widowed Elf
author: Sanesue
description: When he consoles Mrs. Kanamori, a beautiful elf whose husband has passed away, by saying "I'll marry you myself," he is taken in and becomes her fiancée...? A sweet and precious pure love comedy between a clumsy Yankee boy and the slightly natural Kanamori-san, 500 years apart.

title: Erratic Muse
author: Pakil
Un
description:
During his school days, Gio accidentally discovered a rock band called Aurora, which became his muse. Inspired by them, he pursued a career in music and became a skilled composer. However, Aurora couldn’t survive in the overwhelming digital music market and eventually disappeared. Gio could never forget the voice of Aurora’s vocalist—until one day, a mysterious man named Seon-Gyu appeared before him. Their first encounter was suspicious, but through his best friend Hee-Seop, Gio learned an astonishing fact: Seon-Gyu’s voice resembled that of Aurora’s vocalist.
"Hyung, please, just sing once!"
"No."
All he wanted was to hear a single note—why was it so difficult?

title: Too Many Losing Heroines!
author: Amamori Takibi
description:
**“Huh? Who're you calling losing?”**

Background character Nukumizu Kazuhiko witnesses a popular girl, Yanami Anna, getting rejected by another guy.

“Even though he said we'll get married. Don't you think he's pretty mean?”
“When did he say that?”
“When we were 4 or 5 years old.”

Nukumizu has no choice but to comfort Yanami, but this leads him to get involved with other losing heroines like Yakishio Lemon from the Track and Field Club and Chika Komari from the Literature Club.

“Nukumizu-kun. There are two types of girls. Childhood friends or thieving cats.”
“I see. Well, that's a bold statement.”

Bless these girls who only shine after they lose.
___
**Character Designer:** [Imigimuru](https://mangadex.org/author/341a08ca-acbf-49a3-998a-d3451249ec43)

**Additional Links:**  
- [Official Raw Light Novel](https://www.shogakukan.co.jp/books/09453017)

title: The journey of Dionysus
author: Gau meo
description: Dionysus- the young boy who grew up on a small island with no memory of his family and his constant strange nightmares and dreams. One day, Dionysus decided to go on a journey to find his family and discover who he really was, alongside the love of his life, Ariadne.

title: Rise of the Outlaw Tamer and His S-Rank Cat Girl
author: Skyfarm
description: A Tamer is the dirtiest job because they have to deal with monsters, the job of a new rank D adventurer Lint makes him despised in the guild, but his life changes when he meets an S rank adventurer girl who tells Lint to tame her with a way in...
